# Comprehensive Date Format Testing (GEDCOM 7.0)

## Description
Comprehensive GEDCOM 7.0 date format test file containing an extensive collection of valid date formats and date handling scenarios. This file tests the parser's ability to handle all possible date representations supported by GEDCOM 7.0, including edge cases, approximate dates, modified dates, and complex date formats.

## Test Case Type
- **Date format testing**: Tests all GEDCOM 7.0 date format variations
- **Specification edge cases**: Comprehensive coverage of date specification
- **Parsing validation**: Ensures proper date string parsing
- **Boundary conditions**: Tests limits and edge cases of date parsing
- **Large dataset**: Contains extensive date format examples (348 KB)

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 7.0
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~348 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8
- **Source Software**: gedcom7code test suite

## Provenance
- **Source**: gedcom7code/test-files (GEDCOM 7.0 conversion testing)
- **URL**: https://github.com/gedcom7code/test-files
- **Availability**: Open source test files
- **Purpose**: Conversion testing and validation

## License & Usage
- **License**: Open source test files
- **Attribution**: gedcom7code project
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: Subject to project license

## Testing Coverage
- **Exact dates**: YYYY, YYYY-MM, YYYY-MM-DD formats
- **Approximate dates**: Before/after modifiers
- **Modified dates**: From/to/between modifiers
- **Interpreted dates**: User-supplied date formats
- **Range dates**: Date ranges and spans
- **Calendar variations**: Different calendar systems
- **Invalid dates**: Boundary testing of invalid formats
- **Edge cases**: Leap years, boundary dates, special cases
- **Date calculations**: Age calculations from various date formats

## Notes
- Large file with comprehensive date format coverage
- Essential for thorough date parsing validation
- Tests both valid and edge-case date formats
- Useful for performance testing with larger datasets
- Demonstrates GEDCOM 7.0's enhanced date handling capabilities
- Should be used to validate date parsing completeness and correctness
- Contains over 348 KB of date format test cases
